div.h1: HNSW Parameter Tuning: efSearch Tradeoff Analysis

p.em: Optimization Guide for Vector Search Performance

g.text: Parameter: efSearch (Size of Dynamic Candidate List)

ul.li: M: Max connections per node (Memory: O(M * N))
efConstruction: Quality of index build (Time: O(N log N))
Computation cost increases linearly with every increment.
Recommendation: Do not exceed 200 for production APIs.
